productDisplayName: Puma Men Black RS Hi Leather Shoes
description: Style Note puma gives you shoes that will make you want to go on a run with these stylish shoes. Designed for maximum comfort and easy using, these pair of shoes raises your style quotient while out for your regular run. Look good and feel even better with these trendy RS HI running shoes.  Product Details Leather and other materials upper with central lace-ups and a built up (padded) heel collar Padded inner and tongue Rubber midsole TPU outsole with reverse waffle patternd grooves Material and Care Synthetic, leather Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
